mano_cua.result_summary: body添加padding-left:300px后拖拽选择精度严重偏移：视觉框选1个item实际选中8个(IDs:[6,35,36,41,62,87,89,110])，跨多行。选择坐标计算未考虑300px水平偏移，内部选择矩形左移300px导致选中区域与可视拖拽区域完全不一致。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Drag from (833,415) to (930,437) visually covering 1 item resulted in 8 items selected [6,35,36,41,62,87,89,110]. Internal selection calculation offset by 300px due to body padding-left not accounted for.
